name: Samantha
quote: A friend of mine and myself decided to take a very spur of the moment trip to Natchez. We booked this adorable cottage the night before and I was nervous but it was PERFECT. It was even more precious in person. Had everything we needed and was very homey. The bed was extremely comfortable and we slept great. We would love to come back one day! For the price, you truly get more than you think
